claimText: the rush to blame pakistan for the sydney tragedy without a shred of proof was an organized campaign of lies by india.
postText: "misinformation cannot substitute for evidence. the rush to blame pakistan for the sydney tragedy without a shred of proof was an organized campaign of lies by india." - attaullah tarar (moib pakistan) exposed indian propaganda targeting pakistan over the bondi beach incident.
